name: Brainwashing Beam
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>洗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>脳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>線</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Select 1 monster with at least 1 A-Counter on your opponent's side of the field and take control of that monster. During each of your End Phases, remove 1 A-Counter from that controlled monster. If all A-Counters are removed from that monster, or that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.
eff: Select 1 monster with at least 1 A-Counter on your opponent's side of the field and take control of that monster. During each of your End Phases, remove 1 A-Counter from that controlled monster. If all A-Counters are removed from that monster, or that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
